CM.BiographyPrompt: Make your selections on the left to reveal your history...
CM.BonesFateDesc: Cast the 11 sacred dice and let destiny forge your path.

Errors.CustomTableSecurity: Security Risk: Custom tables must be stored locally in your Foundry data folder.
Errors.InvalidItemType: You cannot purchase this item type with starting points.
Errors.NativeLanguageLocked: Native Language Master Die is locked.
Errors.SpellsTooHigh: Starting characters cannot know spells above Sixth Intensity.
Errors.TableValidationFailed: One-Roll Table failed validation — see chat for details.
Errors.TableWarningNoSchools: One-Roll Table has no schools defined — school picker will be hidden.

CM.ForgeLegendSubtitle: How will your story be written?
CM.ManualEntryDesc: Skip the wizard. Open a blank sheet to manually copy over a paper character.
CM.NoSets: No sets rolled. A truly chaotic life.
CM.OneRollDesc: Roll 11d10. Let fate dictate your history, skills, and starting esoterica.
CM.PointBuyDesc: Meticulously spend your starting budget on attributes, skills, and advantages.
CM.ShoppingCartDesc: Drag and drop Advantages, Spells, Martial Paths, and Problems here.
CM.SorceryDesc: Governing Attribute is determined by your specific Spells.
CM.SchoolPickerDesc: Choose the school of magic your character was trained in. This sets the school's associated attribute, domain, and method on your character sheet. Leave unselected for a generalist sorcerer.
CM.SchoolGeneralistNote: Click a school to select it. Click again to deselect and leave the school fields blank for manual entry on the character sheet.
CM.SchoolNoData: No schools are defined in the active setting JSON. Add a 'schools' array to your One-Roll Table file to populate this picker.
CM.WasteDiceDesc: Select Chart A, B, or C for each waste die.

REIGN.SpellAttunementWarn: Attunement required — you are not attuned to this school.
REIGN.EffectsNoneOnItem: No active effects attached to this item.
REIGN.ErrorBothSpecialDice: Reign rules forbid using both Expert and Master dice simultaneously.
REIGN.ErrorDead: Character is dead and cannot act.
REIGN.ErrorHeavyArmorSwim: Swimming in Heavy Armor is impossible. You sink immediately.
REIGN.ErrorMassiveWeapon: Cannot wield {weapon}. Massive weapons require a Body attribute of 4 or higher.
REIGN.MassiveRequiresTwoHanded: Massive is only available on two-handed weapons (big clubs, battleaxes, polearms, greatswords). Enable Two-Handed first.
REIGN.MassiveTooltip: Massive: adds +1 Killing damage on impact. Requires Body 4+ to wield.
REIGN.ErrorProneDodge: You cannot Dodge while Prone. The action auto-fails.
REIGN.ErrorUnconscious: Character is unconscious and cannot act.
REIGN.FightersDesc: Active combatants in this group (= dice pool, max 15)
REIGN.PurchaseHelperDesc: Check an item cost against your Wealth
REIGN.SpellDamagePlaceholderHint: e.g. Width Shock, or Waste Killing
REIGN.ThreatMoraleZero: Morale is 0! The horde cannot roll Morale.
REIGN.ThreatRatingDesc: Elimination threshold — attacks need Width or Height ≥ this value
REIGN.DodgeManeuverHint: Selecting Redirect applies −2d to this Dodge pool automatically.
REIGN.ManeuverTier2Notice: GM resolves this maneuver manually using the rules below.
REIGN.ManeuverDisplayMoveRules: No penalty. Roll attack pool. Success gives +1d (or offsets -1d) on next attack against anyone who saw. First round only. No damage.
REIGN.ManeuverDrawRules: No roll needed. If attacking same round, sets timed as if Width was 1 lower. No penalty to Dodge while drawing.
REIGN.ManeuverFeintResult: Target loses a die from a set. +1d on next attack vs that target (max +2d, doesn't stack with Aim).
REIGN.ManeuverFeintRules: No penalty. Roll attack pool against one opponent. Success: target loses a die from a set AND you get +1d on next attack (stackable to +2d, can't stack with Aim). Cannot be dodged or parried.
REIGN.ManeuverPinResult: Both combatants immobilized until pin is broken or released.
REIGN.ManeuverPinRules: Body + Fight or Coordination + Grapple. -1d if standing. Target escapes with Body + Fight or Coord + Grapple vs Difficulty equal to your Body or Grapple (whichever higher). ED in Grapple: -1d to escape. MD in Grapple: -2d to escape.
REIGN.ManeuverRestrainResult: Successes become Gobble Dice against the restrained target's actions.
REIGN.ManeuverRestrainRules: Body + Fight or Coordination + Grapple. No penalty. Grab arms (prevents arm actions) or legs (prevents movement/kicks). Your successes work as Gobble Dice against that character only. Must re-roll each round.
REIGN.ManeuverShoveResult: No damage. Target pushed back ~5 feet, loses 1 die from a set. +1d to Trip or Slam next round.
REIGN.ManeuverShoveRules: Attack pool, no penalty. No damage. Target moved back ~5 feet, loses 1 die from a set. You get +1d to Trip or Slam next round. Opponents trying to Trip or Slam you get +1d.
REIGN.ManeuverStandResult: You stand up successfully. Prone cleared — Dodge eligibility restored.
REIGN.ManeuverStandRules: No roll if only standing. If combined with another action, -1d penalty. Stand happens automatically during Declare if no other action taken.
REIGN.ManeuverTackleResult: Normal damage dealt. Both combatants downed.
REIGN.ManeuverTackleRules: Body + Fight or Coordination + Grapple at -1d. Does rolled damage, both you and target are downed. Opponents trying to Trip or Slam you get +1d.
REIGN.ManeuverThreatenResult2: Morale Attack equal to the Width of your success.
REIGN.ManeuverThreatenRules: Command + Intimidation, first round only. Only one person per side can Threaten. Produces a Morale Attack equal to the Width of the success.
REIGN.ManeuverWaitRules: Delay your declared action to resolve simultaneously with any later set. If no one else acts, the held action is lost.
REIGN.ManeuverChargeResult3: +2 Shock, +1 Killing added to attack damage.
REIGN.ManeuverChargeResult4: +3 Shock, +2 Killing added to attack damage.
REIGN.ManeuverChargeRules: Multiple action with Run or Ride. Hand-to-hand weapon only. Bonus damage based on the Width of the Run/Ride set.
REIGN.ManeuverDisarmResult2: No damage. Weapon flies away (Height feet).
REIGN.ManeuverDisarmResult3: Weapon flies away. +1 Shock to target's hand.
REIGN.ManeuverDisarmResult4: +2 Shock to hand. You catch the weapon if you have a free hand.
REIGN.ManeuverDisarmRules: Called shot to the arm holding the weapon. If seizing an edged weapon bare-handed, multiple action with Dodge or accept 1 Killing to an arm.
REIGN.ManeuverDisfiguringStrikeResult2: 1 Killing damage. 5pt Beauty drops to 3, 3pt to 1, 1pt lost. No Beauty = gain Gruesome Problem.
REIGN.ManeuverDisfiguringStrikeResult3: As 2×, but 5pt Beauty drops to 1, 3pt lost entirely.
REIGN.ManeuverDisfiguringStrikeResult4: All Beauty lost. Gain Gruesome Problem.
REIGN.ManeuverDisfiguringStrikeRules: Called shot to the head. Must use a weapon that does Killing damage. Width determines severity of scarring.
REIGN.ManeuverDisplayKillResult3: Morale Attack = max(Height, Width) + Command stat.
REIGN.ManeuverDisplayKillResult4: Morale Attack = max(Height, Width) + Command + Intimidation.
REIGN.ManeuverDisplayKillRules: Normal attack at -1d. Must kill the target to trigger the Morale Attack. Easier against unworthy opponents.
REIGN.ManeuverKnockoutResult2: All Killing damage from the weapon is converted to Shock.
REIGN.ManeuverKnockoutResult3: All Killing converted to Shock, plus +1 extra Shock.
REIGN.ManeuverKnockoutResult4: All Killing converted to Shock, +3 extra Shock. Overflow Shock discarded instead of converting to Killing.
REIGN.ManeuverKnockoutRules: Called shot to the head. All Killing damage converted to Shock. Higher Width tiers add bonus Shock and prevent lethal overflow.
REIGN.ManeuverSlamResult2: Target downed. 1 Shock to locations 3 and 5 (arms).
REIGN.ManeuverSlamResult3: Target downed. 1 Shock to both arms, both legs, and torso.
REIGN.ManeuverSlamResult4: Target downed. 1 Shock to every location. Extra 1 Shock to the Height location.
REIGN.ManeuverSlamRules: Body + Fight or Coordination + Grapple at Difficulty 3. Target must be within 100 lbs of your weight. Cannot slam someone already downed.
REIGN.ManeuverStrangleResult2: 2 Shock to head. Maintain hold next round for 2 more Shock without rolling.
REIGN.ManeuverStrangleResult3: 3 Shock to head. Maintain hold next round for 3 more Shock without rolling.
REIGN.ManeuverStrangleResult4: Width+1 Shock to head. Maintain hold next round for 4 more Shock without rolling.
REIGN.ManeuverStrangleRules: Called shot to the head. No edged weapons. No -1d penalty if target already pinned. While strangling: no other attacks, no dodge/parry, limited movement.
REIGN.ManeuverTripResult2: No damage. Target loses a die from a set. -1d penalty on all actions next round.
REIGN.ManeuverTripResult4: As 3×, plus 1 Shock to each arm from awkward landing.
REIGN.ManeuverTripRules: Called shot to leg (location 1 or 2). No called-shot penalty. +1d if target is using Shove, Tackle, or foot Charge.
REIGN.ManeuverIronKissResult2: No damage. Set Up stores a 2×10 automatic attack — Execute next round without rolling.
REIGN.ManeuverIronKissResult3: No damage. Set Up stores a 4×10 automatic attack — Execute next round without rolling.
REIGN.ManeuverIronKissResult4: No damage. Set Up stores a 6×10 automatic attack — Execute next round without rolling.
REIGN.ManeuverIronKissRules: Called shot to the head at -2d (replaces standard -1d). Requires edged or pointed weapon. Places blade against throat — next round can deliver guaranteed lethal strike.
REIGN.ManeuverRedirectResult2: Ruined attacks (reduced to Width 1) redirect to a target of your choice at Width-1.
REIGN.ManeuverRedirectResult3: Ruined attacks redirect at full Width.
REIGN.ManeuverRedirectResult4: All attacks can be redirected, even if not fully ruined. You take reduced damage, chosen enemy takes full.
REIGN.ManeuverRedirectRules: Dodge at -2d. Use Gobble Dice to reduce enemy sets, then redirect the spoiled attack to another enemy. Only works with multiple opponents.
REIGN.ManeuverSubmissionHoldResult2: 1 Shock to limb. Target can wrench free (2 Killing to limb) or stay pinned next round.
REIGN.ManeuverSubmissionHoldResult3: 3 Shock to limb. Wrenching free does 3 Killing.
REIGN.ManeuverSubmissionHoldResult4: 5 Shock to limb. Wrenching free does 4 Killing.
REIGN.ManeuverSubmissionHoldRules: Body + Fight or Coord + Grapple at -1d (no penalty if already pinned). Target chooses: stay held (auto-pinned next round) or wrench free (takes Killing damage).
REIGN.ManeuverFormationChargeResult: Choose: Evasion (impose Difficulty to ranged attacks), Superior Position (+1d next attack), or Clash and Chaos (Gobble Dice vs other vehicles).
REIGN.ManeuverFormationChargeRules: Ride skill. Requires 5+ mounts/vehicles. Multiple sets give multiple effects. Cannot be used on watercraft.
REIGN.QRMDAssign: Assign a face value to your Master Die.
